description: A classic fish shape with a modern twist. Wide point forward for maximum paddle and speed in small surf.
High-performance shortboard designed for punchy beach break. Concave entry with a deep single to double concave through the fins.
Custom glassing service with a full range of tint colours and resin art options. Price on application.
The best-selling everyday shortboard. Works in everything from waist-high to overhead+ surf.
Compact and responsive. Designed for surfers who want a shorter board that still paddles and generates speed easily.
